Wendlenner of Wendel Rosen (510.834.6600) for plaintiff and moving party; Robert L. Wood of the Law Offices of Robert L. Wood (408.280.5000) for defendant and responding party. Discussed and the court modified its ruling as follows: on agreement of the parties, the motion is granted except as to the request for admissions, which is denied. Sanctions against defendant are granted in the amount of $1265. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Not reported

payments.description: REQ OR STIP AND ORDER W/O HEARING
